parameters.query:
-- Atualiza LAST_UPDATE e calcula SHOULD_RUN
-- Compatível 100% com extensão Chrome

WITH tz AS (
  SELECT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp AS brazil_now
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE update_extension_services u
  SET "LAST_UPDATE" = tz.brazil_now
  FROM tz
  RETURNING u.*
)
SELECT
  "ACTION",
  "RUN_AFTER",
  "RUN_STATUS",
  "PROGRESS_VALUE",
  "LAST_RUN",
  "LAST_UPDATE",
  CASE
    WHEN "LAST_RUN" IS NULL THEN false
    WHEN "RUN_STATUS" = 0 THEN false
    ELSE ((SELECT brazil_now FROM tz) - "LAST_RUN") > make_interval(mins => COALESCE("RUN_AFTER", 0))
  END AS "SHOULD_RUN"
FROM updated
ORDER BY "ACTION";
